title: LiteMc
description: LiteMc is the Lover for Low-End PC.
body:
![Wow the new version.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ba7890e3e6aadc61ecb0a8b728430efcc27663e_0.webp)

This Shader Consists of,
- Shadows (**NEW**PCF Filter)
- Water Reflection(Improved)
- God Rays(Improved)
  
**_NEW_**

- New sky colour
- Volumetric clouds(wow)
- new metalic reflection and entitie reflection(for The golems)



  
Many More Will Be added soon 
Like Cmaera effects like depth of field, motion blur\
shader menu, and many more



GPU Minimun Requirement.\
Intal HD Graphics 4600\
GPU Reccomended Requirement.\
AMD Radeon R7 250 Or Nvidia Gt 740.

OR

Any GPU That supports DirectX 11
